title: TC_UPDATE_001: Verify Free 60 artwork display after updating from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest on Studio iOS
steps: Precondition: Device is on Studio iOS with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5).
1. Launch the app on Studio iOS.
2. Navigate to the Free 60 artwork section.
3. Capture a screenshot of the currently displayed artwork.
4. Trigger the update process from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest available version.
5. Wait for the update to complete and the app to restart.
6. Navigate again to the Free 60 artwork section.
7. Capture a screenshot of the artwork displayed post-update.
8. Compare the pre-update and post-update artwork screenshots for consistency and correct rendering.
expected: The Free 60 artwork is displayed correctly after the update, with no blank/empty spaces, missing images, or rendering errors. The post-update artwork matches the expected content.

title: TC_UPDATE_002: Verify Free 60 artwork display after updating from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest on PTT
steps: Precondition: Device is on PTT with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5).
1. Launch the app on PTT.
2. Navigate to the Free 60 artwork section.
3. Verify that artwork thumbnails and full-size images are loaded.
4. Trigger the update process from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest available version.
5. Wait for the update to complete and the app to restart.
6. Navigate again to the Free 60 artwork section.
7. Verify that artwork thumbnails and full-size images are loaded.
8. Scroll through the entire Free 60 artwork gallery to ensure all items render.
expected: All Free 60 artwork items are displayed correctly post-update on PTT. No missing images, broken placeholders, or loading failures occur.

title: TC_UPDATE_003: Verify DFU is blocked when iPhone battery is low after update
steps: Precondition: iPhone battery level is at or below the low battery threshold (e.g., ≤ 20%).
1. Launch the app on Studio iOS or PTT with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5).
2. Update the app to the latest version.
3. After update completes, navigate to the Device Firmware Update (DFU) section.
4. Attempt to initiate a DFU process.
5. Observe the system response.
6. Check if any warning or blocking message is displayed regarding low battery.
7. Verify that the DFU process does not proceed.
expected: The DFU process is blocked with a clear warning message indicating that the iPhone battery is too low to perform the firmware update. The user cannot proceed with DFU until the battery is sufficiently charged.

title: TC_UPDATE_004: Verify DFU becomes available after charging iPhone from low battery state post-update
steps: Precondition: iPhone battery level is at or below the low battery threshold (e.g., ≤ 20%).
1. Launch the app on Studio iOS or PTT with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5).
2. Update the app to the latest version.
3. After update completes, navigate to the DFU section and attempt DFU.
4. Verify DFU is blocked with a low battery warning.
5. Connect the iPhone to a charger and charge the battery above the low battery threshold (e.g., > 30%).
6. Navigate again to the DFU section.
7. Attempt to initiate the DFU process.
expected: After charging the iPhone above the low battery threshold, the DFU process becomes available and can be initiated without the low battery warning.

title: TC_UPDATE_005: Verify post-update UI validation for artwork and media content on Studio iOS
steps: Precondition: Device is on Studio iOS with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5).
1. Launch the app and update to the latest version.
2. After update completes, navigate to the main media/artwork gallery.
3. Verify that all UI elements (headers, titles, navigation bars) are correctly displayed.
4. Verify that artwork thumbnails load within 5 seconds.
5. Tap on a Free 60 artwork item to open full-screen view.
6. Verify the full-screen artwork renders without distortion, cropping, or missing areas.
7. Verify that metadata (title, artist, date) associated with the artwork is displayed correctly.
8. Navigate back and repeat steps 5-7 for 3 additional artwork items.
expected: All UI elements are correctly rendered post-update. Artwork thumbnails and full-screen views load correctly with no distortion or missing content. Associated metadata is accurate and displayed.

title: TC_UPDATE_006: Verify post-update UI validation for artwork and media content on PTT
steps: Precondition: Device is on PTT with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5).
1. Launch the app and update to the latest version.
2. After update completes, navigate to the main media/artwork gallery.
3. Verify that all UI elements (headers, titles, navigation bars) are correctly displayed.
4. Verify that artwork thumbnails load within 5 seconds.
5. Tap on a Free 60 artwork item to open full-screen view.
6. Verify the full-screen artwork renders without distortion, cropping, or missing areas.
7. Verify that metadata (title, artist, date) associated with the artwork is displayed correctly.
8. Navigate back and repeat steps 5-7 for 3 additional artwork items.
expected: All UI elements are correctly rendered post-update on PTT. Artwork thumbnails and full-screen views load correctly with no distortion or missing content. Associated metadata is accurate and displayed.

title: TC_UPDATE_007: Verify low battery warning persists across app restarts after update
steps: Precondition: iPhone battery level is at or below the low battery threshold (e.g., ≤ 20%).
1. Launch the app on Studio iOS or PTT with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5).
2. Update the app to the latest version.
3. After update completes, navigate to the DFU section and verify DFU is blocked.
4. Force close the app.
5. Re-launch the app.
6. Navigate to the DFU section again.
7. Attempt to initiate DFU.
expected: The low battery warning persists across app restarts. DFU remains blocked until the battery is charged above the threshold, even after force-closing and re-launching the app.

title: TC_UPDATE_008: Verify artwork display is not affected by low battery state after update
steps: Precondition: iPhone battery level is at or below the low battery threshold (e.g., ≤ 20%).
1. Launch the app on Studio iOS or PTT with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5).
2. Update the app to the latest version.
3. After update completes, navigate to the Free 60 artwork section.
4. Verify that artwork thumbnails load correctly.
5. Tap on an artwork item to open full-screen view.
6. Verify the artwork renders correctly.
7. Verify that the low battery warning (if shown) does not overlap or obscure the artwork display.
expected: Free 60 artwork is displayed correctly even when the iPhone battery is low. The low battery state only affects DFU functionality, not artwork rendering or media content display.

title: TC_UPDATE_009: Verify DFU button state (enabled/disabled) reflects battery level after update
steps: Precondition: iPhone battery level is at or below the low battery threshold (e.g., ≤ 20%).
1. Launch the app on Studio iOS or PTT with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5).
2. Update the app to the latest version.
3. After update completes, navigate to the DFU section.
4. Observe the DFU button state (should be disabled/greyed out).
5. Verify a tooltip or label explains the button is disabled due to low battery.
6. Charge the iPhone above the low battery threshold.
7. Navigate back to the DFU section.
8. Observe the DFU button state (should be enabled/active).
expected: The DFU button is disabled/greyed out when the battery is low, with an explanatory tooltip or label. After charging, the button becomes enabled/active, allowing DFU to proceed.

title: TC_UPDATE_010: Verify no data loss of Free 60 artwork after update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest
steps: Precondition: Device is on Studio iOS or PTT with app version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) and has Free 60 artwork content cached or downloaded.
1. Launch the app and note the total count of Free 60 artwork items available.
2. Capture screenshots of all artwork items for reference.
3. Update the app to the latest version.
4. After update completes, navigate to the Free 60 artwork section.
5. Verify the total count of artwork items matches the pre-update count.
6. Compare each artwork item against the pre-update screenshots.
7. Verify that no artwork items are missing, corrupted, or replaced with placeholders.
expected: No data loss occurs during the update. All Free 60 artwork items are preserved with correct rendering, matching the pre-update state in both count and content.
